html:
2026-0570
2026-06-11NRPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of the Vice-Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax MeasuresAppointment of Robert Glen Cox of Winnipeg, Manitoba, to be a special adviser to the Minister of National Revenue, to serve as Vice-Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years, on a part-time basis.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Vice-Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures
precis: Appointment of Robert Glen Cox of Winnipeg, Manitoba, to be a special adviser to the Minister of National Revenue, to serve as Vice-Chairperson of the Independent Advisory Board on Eligibility for Journalism Tax Measures, to hold office during pleasure for a term of four years, on a part-time basis.
